name: Gale Reef
description: All-inclusive reef diving getaway to the Caribbean. Package covers round-trip flights from NYC, 4 nights at Emerald Bay Resort & Spa, daily 2-tank boat dives with certified guides, full equipment rental, all meals and drinks, beachside yoga sessions, and a private sunset sailing cruise. No hidden fees. Everything is included from the moment you land.

name: Dawson's Reef
description: A premium diving escape to Dawson's Reef, famed for its towering sea fans, vibrant sponges, and pristine coral gardens. All-inclusive package includes round-trip flights from NYC, 5 nights at Blue Lagoon Villas, unlimited snorkel and kayak gear, 5 days of guided boat dives, all meals and open bar, and nightly beachfire dinners with fresh-caught seafood prepared by local chefs.

name: Claire's Reef
description: Claire's Reef is celebrated for crystal-clear visibility and breathtaking biodiversity. All-inclusive package covers round-trip flights from NYC, 6 nights at Coral Sands Hideaway, daily boat dives led by certified marine biologists, nurse shark and dolphin encounter excursions, all meals and premium drinks, and a rooftop farewell dinner with panoramic ocean views.

name: Bali Bliss
description: Escape to the serene shores of Bali on this fully all-inclusive package. Covers round-trip flights from LA, 7 nights at The Tranquil Lotus Resort, all meals with daily breakfast and dinner included, daily spa treatments, guided Ubud temple tour, authentic Balinese cooking class, a hidden waterfall hike, and a private sunset snorkel cruise along the coast.

name: Maldives Magic
description: The ultimate overwater bungalow experience in the Maldives. All-inclusive package includes round-trip flights from NYC plus domestic seaplane transfer to the island, 5 nights in a private overwater suite, all gourmet meals and premium drinks, guided snorkeling with manta rays and whale sharks, a sunset dolphin cruise, and a couples spa ritual. Absolutely nothing left to pay on arrival.

name: Japan Cultural Journey
description: An immersive all-inclusive journey through Japan's ancient culture and modern wonder. Covers round-trip flights from LAX, 10 nights split between a Tokyo boutique hotel and a traditional Shuhokaku Kogetsu Ryokan with tatami rooms and private onsen, daily breakfast plus nightly kaiseki dinners, bullet train (Shinkansen) passes, guided visits to Kyoto shrines and bamboo forests, a tea ceremony workshop, and a private Tsukiji fish market tour with a local chef.

name: Caribbean Luxury Retreat
description: True all-inclusive Caribbean luxury at its finest. Package covers round-trip flights from NYC, 7 nights at Azure Ocean Suites with private beachfront suite and butler service, all meals and premium open bar, daily spa treatments with island botanicals, a private catamaran island-hopping day trip, snorkeling on pristine reefs, a sunset cocktail cruise, and fresh lobster beach dinner under the stars.

name: Thailand Island Hopper
description: Hop between Thailand's most stunning islands on this all-inclusive island adventure. Package includes round-trip flights from LAX, 8 nights across Koh Samui and Koh Lanta, longtail boat island excursions, a floating market cooking class, an elephant sanctuary visit, traditional Thai massage sessions, all meals including nightly beach seafood grills, and all inter-island transfers and ferry tickets.

name: Phu Quoc Beach Retreat
description: Slow down on Vietnam's largest island. Package covers round-trip flights from LAX with a Hanoi layover, 6 nights in a beachfront villa at Sunset Sands, daily breakfast and dinner with vegetarian options, a private sunset cruise along the western coast, snorkeling among the An Thoi islands, a hands-on Vietnamese cooking class with a local chef, and two spa treatments at the resort wellness center.

name: VinWonders Phu Quoc Family Pass
description: A trip designed for families with kids who want both a beach and a theme park. Package covers round-trip flights from LAX, 5 nights in a connecting family suite, unlimited daily access to the VinWonders Phu Quoc theme park, entry to Safari Phu Quoc with its open-air animal habitats, all meals at the resort, private airport transfers, and two guided day tours of nearby pearl farms and fish sauce factories.

name: Amsterdam Canal Discoveries
description: Spend four days in one of Europe's most walkable capitals. Package covers round-trip flights from JFK, 4 nights at the Pulitzer Amsterdam in a canal-facing suite, daily Dutch breakfast, a private canal boat tour at golden hour, fast-track tickets to the Van Gogh Museum, a small-group guided tour of the Rijksmuseum, and a quality bike included for every guest so you can explore the city the way locals do.

name: Swiss Alps Ski Week
description: Seven nights at the foot of the Matterhorn for skiers of every level. Package covers round-trip flights to Zurich with onward rail to Zermatt, 7 nights in a traditional alpine chalet, daily breakfast and a five-course dinner, a 6-day lift pass for the Zermatt ski area, group lessons for beginners and intermediates with English-speaking instructors, a traditional Swiss fondue dinner with mountain views, and a ride on the historic cogwheel railway to Gornergrat at 3,089 meters.

name: Rio de Janeiro Carnival
description: Experience Carnival at its most legendary city. Package covers round-trip flights from Miami, 6 nights at the iconic Copacabana Palace, daily breakfast on the famed terrace, premium tickets for two nights at the Sambadrome to watch the championship samba schools, a guided skip-the-line tour to Christ the Redeemer at sunrise, a Sugarloaf Mountain cable car ride with a stop at the panoramic deck, and a private sunset boat cruise from Ipanema with fresh caipirinhas on board.

name: Marrakech Souks & Riads
includes: Guided medina and souks walking tour
description: Five nights inside the walls of the ochre city. Package covers round-trip flights from JFK with a Paris connection, 5 nights at La Mamounia in a traditional riad room, daily Moroccan breakfast on the terrace, a private guided walking tour of the medina and Jemaa el-Fnaa souks, a full hammam ritual at the resort spa, a day excursion into the Atlas Mountains with a Berber lunch in a mountain village, and a hands-on tagine cooking class with a local riad chef.

name: Seychelles Paradise Cruise
description: Eight nights of granite boulders, turquoise lagoons, and the slowest possible pace. Package covers round-trip flights from JFK to Mahe, 5 nights in a beachfront suite at the Constance Lemuria followed by a 3 night small-ship cruise between Praslin and La Digue, all gourmet meals and premium drinks, a guided trip to the iconic Anse Source d'Argent beach, a visit to the Aldabra giant tortoise sanctuary, private snorkeling sessions with green sea turtles, and two signature spa rituals at the resort wellness center.
